column1: Hey Samantha, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
Samantha whats up its Spiffy, on my work line. shoot me a text here if you have any questions or need anything with your spring break reservation
yo! Samantha wassup its Spiffy on my work line
I got approved for 17th for your extension on final payments. did you want to take that?
Hey spiffy when you get a second. Could we set up a time to call. I have a few questions. I'm available basically anytime.
Yea I'm around now if you'd like
On mobile if you don't mind
Perfect. Thanks. Give me about 20 minutes. Should i call this number or your other one?
We've actually can I call you closer to 9 PM central time 10 PM Eastern time? Idk where you live 😂
Lol I'm on eastern yea. I may be out at 10pm tbh lol
Wanna shoot me a text around then and we'll see if we can sync up?
Oh true true. Let's plan for a call tomorrow then. Thank you!
Shit i forgot about it. I ended up going out too so maybe tomorrow would be better
I'm free right now if you are too!
I tried calling this number and it wasn't working so if you just wanna give me a call that'll probs work
just tried calling as well and it went to an odd voicemail lol
We have $270 round trip flight to Cancun . Cheapest flight option for everything. It's March 15-19th
yo! go a head and get your flights for 15-19 to cancun
You're the best thank you so so much
Hey ! Is there any way you can hook us up with that free booze cruise in Cancun.. we were so looking forward to that 😩
Hey Spiffy! I see there's the 4 person room for $554. We've got 2 more people. Would it be possible to add them onto our reservation and have two separate rooms? Lmk Thank you!
hey! so to get the $554 we would have to put all four of you in one room
or were you looking to do 2 rooms of 4?
OH okay. That's makes sense. Would the room be 2 queen beds ?
Like what would the layout of the room be for the 4 of us
sup sam checkin in hows everything on your end
Sam whats good! did you want to add those two ppl? will just need to know asap
I don't think the 2 will go tbh just bc I haven't heard anything about it
They are in class right now so they probs wont answer for another hour or so
Yo Sam! you have a balance on your account we needa get squared up so that we can get y'all finalized
Hi sorry yes i can do that by the end of today. Thanks for reminding me!
np! lmk if you need anything
Both of ours are paid off. What happens now!
dope! you'll now move into the pre departure process. wanna add your flight info into the flights tab on your account? so we can schedule your airport transportation
For sure. Thanks! Anything else after i add flights ?
nope! once those are in we will move you to pre-departure, and you'll get emails with everything you need!
Hey spiffy! Random question what happens to all the spring breakers going to Mexico if they put a travel ban on Cancun LOL
lol I dont think they will tbh. the main incident was in Jalisco which is the west coast of Mexico
I hope not but just incase it does what do we do lol that's a lot of money to be out of
there hasnt been any reports of anything in the hotel zone which is where most tourists go and spring break takes place
No yes I do get that. What happens to the trip & our money if it were to happen that we can not travel to Cancun
lets just hope we dont get there lol. I'm honestly not sure what happens during a complete travel ban. may have to get you back to Punta Cana
LMAOO for real Punta Cana. We actually just looked and now the flights are $700 to punta so we def can't do that 😭
lol y'all should be aight. US Embassy just released that travel is as normal in Cancun
Yay that's good to hear. Hoping it stays that way!
Hi how do we get the details of the booze cruise !
And how do we know the person who's picking us up from the airport and that it's actually them lol
Yo! They'll be holding a sign that says Go Blue and/or have blue t shirts on that say Go Blue
Perfect thanks! What about the booze cruise !

the booze cruise you have on your accounts just make sure you screenshot the voucher so you can show it to the party pass desk after check in and redeem your tickets. they will tell you exactly which day, time, and more details
Amazing thanks! Where do we find the voucher at
On your accounts just log in and hit view vouchers
Loved “On your accounts just log in and hit view vouchers”
yoo! did y'all want to add any party pass tickets to your packages?
Hi!! I think we are all good we are just going to relax on the beach with some pina coladas and see what nightlife is on the resort !
Hey what's this $10 sanitation fee per night per room about lol

hey, yea its a Cancun Mexico specific thing thats required by all of the resorts. Like a govt required sanitation fee. we aren't able to charge that on our end since its not a US govt tax or fee. its $10 split between the two of you. usually we have 4 to a room so it ends up costing like nothing once ppl split it up
Hey it's saying we need forms when we land for customs. Do you know what form that is
Hey where'd you see that, I think that's only for DE
Nahh you're good pretty sure. There use to be a form to fill out when you land but I don't think they do that anymore
safe travels today! weeks gonna be lit
Do i need to have my voucher printed for hotel & booze cruise i forgot to do that and we are otw to the airport lol
Can we get early check in or something bc we are going to be there way before 3 lol
You be straight they'll let you onto the resort and you can chill til whenever rooms are ready
If they're ready when you get there they'll let you check in
Oh good can we drink too even if the room isn't ready yet
Ummmm no one is here to pick us up from airport lol
Hey now have been waiting an hour for someone to come pick us up. They haven't what do we do about this? They're just nowhere to be found.
Hey you all good now? Just spoke to him
